evals.name: multi-agent-code-review
evals.prompt: Run a team review on the current changes. I've been working on the preprocessing and training modules.
evals.expected_output: Should identify changed files, spawn parallel reviewers, collect feedback, and present unified findings with severity levels.

assertions.text: Identifies what files have changed (git diff or specified files)
Spawns at least 2 different reviewer agents
Classifies findings by severity (critical, warning, info)
Presents a unified summary of all reviewer findings
